rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Intention To Move To Set Aside And Vacate Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday November 4, 2016, line 1. THIRD PARTY DAVID TSE Notice Of Intention To Move To Set Aside And Vacate Judgment DENIED. Mr. Tse fails to cite any law or fact entitling him to relief under CCP 473, CCP 473.5 or based on extrinsic fraud. Additionally, Mr. Tse has no standing to bring this motion under CCP 663 as he failed to show immediate or pecuniary interest qualifying him as an "aggrieved party" under the circumstances of this case. Mr. Tse may bring his argument regarding inapplicability of the judgment in this case to him as an indispensable party in his own pending action or another action (collaterally attack). Save Our Bay, Inc. v. San Diego Unified Port Dist. (1996) 42 Cal.App.4th 686. Whether Mr. Tse is bound by the judgment in this case and whether is he an indispensable party shall be addressed, if at all, in the Tse matter. =(501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: LIN TENG VS. ANANYA BIONETWORKS, INC. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Compel Answers, Without Objections To Plaintiffs Form Interrogatories General, Set One, Form Interrogatories Unlawful Detainer, Set One And Special Interrogatories, Set One, Against Defendant Ananya Pattanayak; Request For Order Awarding Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant Ananya Pattanayak, In The Amount Of $1,500.00
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday November 4, 2016, line 6. PLAINTIFF LIN TENG Motion To Compel Answers, Without Objections To Plaintiffs Form Interrogatories General, Set One, Form Interrogatories Unlawful Detainer, Set One And Special Interrogatories, Set One, Against Defendant Ananya Pattanayak; Request For Order Awarding Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant Ananya Pattanayak, In The Amount Of $1,500.00 GRANTED, subject to opposition. Defendant shall provide complete responses without objections within 5 days of notice of entry of the order. Trial is continued to November 21, 2016 for Plaintiff to obtain the necessary discovery sought herein to be able to prepare for trial. Sanctions granted in the amount of $750. =(501/AJR)
